title: dupatya pilifera
intro: Dupatya pilifera, also known as the Bearberry or Uva-ursi, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dupatya pilifera include treating urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and digestive issues, as well as helping to prevent kidney stones and improving overall urinary health. Herbal preparations of Dupatya pilifera include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or combining them with other herbs.
